author: Matt
body: congrats, you big lug. many more, many more!

author: Oliver
body: Awesome site guys and happy birthday!

author: Burgo
body:
@Mick, Matt & Oliver,

Thanks so much for the kind words guys. Hope you stick around for the terrible twos! :)

author: Horse
body:
A very belated, and very happy 1st birthday to you Burgo’s Blog :D

Thanks for helping to pull me from my daily Jimi Hendrix laden ‘haze’, by exposing me to artists whom i would never have come across.

For this; I thank you!

Cheers mate

author: Cara
body: CONGRATS! Site is awsome and cant wait to what the second year will bring!

author: Makakman
body:
Sorry I’m late to the party guys, just catching up on my feeds!!

Congrats on your your 1st birthday, great site and it can only get bigger from here :)

author: Burgo
body:
@Horse, Cara & Makakman,

Thanks for stopping by and the birthday wishes guys! Hope to see you around for a while to come!
